description: Load custom plug-in implementations. Use to find and instantiate implementations of custom plug-in types.

methods.name: findImplementations
methods.description: Returns the script IDs of custom plug-in type implementations. If includeDefault is true, the default implementation is included.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The script ID of the custom plug-in type

methods.name: loadImplementation
methods.description: Instantiates an implementation of the custom plug-in type. If no implementation is specified, the default implementation is loaded.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The script ID of the custom plug-in type

params.name: options.implementation
params.description: The script ID of the plug-in implementation to load
